# Copyright {.unnumbered}

*The Statistics of Blockchain for Public Health* by
Ronald 'Ryy' G. Thomas is licensed under a
[Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives
4.0 International
License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/).

The code samples in this book are licensed under
[Creative Commons CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0
1.0)](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/),
i.e. the public domain.

To cite this book, please use:

> Thomas, R. G. (2026). *The Statistics of Blockchain for
> Public Health: A Graduate Course in Consensus,
> Cryptography, and On-Chain Data*. Available at
> <https://blockchain.rgtlab.org>.

::: {.content-visible when-format='pdf'}
```{=latex}
\clearpage
\tableofcontents
\clearpage
```
:::
